entries.concept_hook: A former opera singer whose lethal vocal harmonics can shatter bone and mind, using her voice as both weapon and weaponized seduction.
entries.narrative_role: The seductress who weaponizes beauty and sound, manipulating opponents psychologically before destroying them
entries.media_archetype_inspiration: Deadly vocalist from supernatural thriller films, femme fatale from classic noir

entries.concept_hook: A Russian hardman whose brutal striking power comes from raw physicality and combat experience—no powers, just violence refined over decades.
entries.narrative_role: The physically imposing force who represents raw masculine power, a wall others must find ways around
entries.media_archetype_inspiration: Russian fight club monster, brutal bouncer from action cinema
entries.face_adornment: facial scars from ear to jaw

entries.concept_hook: A Japanese shadow operative who manipulates darkness itself, striking from nowhere and vanishing before retaliation—a ghost with a blade.
entries.narrative_role: The mysterious newcomer whose supernatural shadow techniques make her unpredictable and terrifying
entries.media_archetype_inspiration: Ninja from modern anime, supernatural assassin from video games

entries.concept_hook: A Thai fighter whose mastery of Muay Thai and mystical chi manipulation makes him a precise, calculated killer who fights like a dance.
entries.narrative_role: The spiritual counter to brute force, using precision and mystical energy to defeat larger opponents
entries.media_archetype_inspiration: Monk warrior from martial arts films, mystical fighter from fantasy anime

entries.concept_hook: A deadly Japanese assassin who relies on pure human training, reflexes, and precision rather than any supernatural gifts—death delivered with surgical perfection.
entries.narrative_role: The human pinnacle—proof that mortal skill can match any supernatural advantage. Her rivalry with Natasha represents order vs chaos, discipline vs seduction.
entries.media_archetype_inspiration: Classic anime assassin (Cblade from Noir, Femio from Kill la Kill) meets real-world ninjutsu aesthetics

entries.concept_hook: A Russian seductress whose supernatural allure is less magical gift than calculated weapon—every gesture, every glance is engineered to destabilize opponents.
entries.narrative_role: The destabilizer—her power lies in making opponents question their own resolve. Her rivalry with Kasumi is personal: she wants to prove that charm conquers all, even perfect discipline.
entries.media_archetype_inspiration: Cold War femme fatale meets supernatural seductress (Black Widow, Mystique's seduction scenes)

entries.concept_hook: A影子刺客 from Mumbai trained in the ancient art of Thuggee, using seduction and poison to lure prey before delivering the killing strike.
entries.narrative_role: The deadly seductress who weaponizes beauty and patience—kills with a smile and a kiss goodbye
entries.media_archetype_inspiration: Poison Ivy meets Black Widow—femme fatale assassin using toxins and charm

entries.concept_hook: An Australian surf champion turned ring siren whose hypnotic voice and aquatic grace drown opponents in delusion before they realize they've already lost.
entries.narrative_role: The deceptive rookie who uses misdirection and psychological warfare—looks like a beach girl, fights like a predator
entries.media_archetype_inspiration: Bayonetta's flair meets a competitive swimmer—glamour and grace as weapons

entries.concept_hook: A legendary Iranian poison master and former Savak operative who weaponizes fear, reputation, and lethal toxins—her very name makes opponents hesitate.
entries.narrative_role: The psychological warfare specialist who makes opponents scared to even touch her—fear is her primary weapon
entries.media_archetype_inspiration: female Bond villain crossed with classic femme fatale—think Flora Montez from Killer Instinct meets a Cold War spy thriller
entries.hair_color: jet black with deep burgundy highlights

entries.concept_hook: A young Swedish cyborg prodigy whose experimental neural interfaces allow her to predict and counter opponent movements before they happen.
entries.narrative_role: The breakout tech wonderkid—fresh, cocky, and terrifyingly adaptive with every fight
entries.media_archetype_inspiration: anime hacker fighter meets cyberpunk brawler—think Motoko Kusanagi meets a fighting game shoto character
entries.hair_color: platinum silver with neon yellow streaks at tips

entries.concept_hook: A seductress whose supernatural voice can shatter minds or bend wills, using performative violence as her primary weapon
entries.narrative_role: The charismatic face of the league who weaponizes attention itself
entries.media_archetype_inspiration: Dead or Alive's Ayane meets Jennifer Hale's characters

entries.concept_hook: A shadow-walking assassin who strikes from darkness, her blade appearing from nowhere before vanishing again
entries.narrative_role: The deadly wildcard who proves looks can be deceiving

entries.concept_hook: A massive enhanced soldier whose body has been rebuilt with experimental serum, radiating raw physical threat
entries.narrative_role: The immovable force that tests everyone else's limits

entries.concept_hook: A fortuneteller who sees combat moments before they happen, making her nearly impossible to hit
entries.narrative_role: The mystical tactician who fights with forbidden knowledge
entries.media_archetype_inspiration: Doctor Strange's mystic arts meets Carmen Sandiego

entries.concept_hook: A scarred bare-knuckle brawler from the underground fight scene who relies on pure savagery and pain tolerance
entries.narrative_role: The human wall who proves willpower beats powers

entries.concept_hook: A teenage martial prodigy whose supernatural reflexes let her see and react to attacks before they land
entries.narrative_role: The rising star whose potential terrifies veterans
entries.media_archetype_inspiration: Street Fighter's Sakura meets Kill la Kill

entries.concept_hook: A precision-focused technician who studies opponents like chess problems, finding mechanical solutions to organic threats
entries.narrative_role: The calculating mastermind who beats opponents before fighting starts

entries.concept_hook: A chemically enhanced fighter whose body produces lethal toxins, making every touch potentially fatal
entries.narrative_role: The dangerous beauty who makes every match high-stakes
entries.media_archetype_inspiration: Metal Gear's Quiet meets poison dart frog aesthetics
